== Notes for [[Item:Q108925|Q108925]] ==

51. ABDULLAH.UBAIDILLAH-11.
was born in Basrah and died in 383, Somal, Yamen.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d11.htm#i15
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0015.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000009114967288

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
